name: fable-method
description: The Fable Way — a self-contained working-discipline plugin for capable models; each workspace grows its own git-ignored project overlay.

plugins.name: fable-method
plugins.description: Self-contained 'Fable Way' working discipline: an auto-triggering method skill + runner skills (scope, adversarial review, verify, ship), plus a per-workspace git-ignored .fable/project.md overlay. No external plugin/skill dependencies.
